label: Fortress Pak
blurb: Cybersecurity, InfoSec & Systems Engineering. Breach prevention and enterprise uptime.

skills.label: Ssl Certificate Rotator
skills.method: Detects expiring certs 30 days out, provisions new ones via Let's Encrypt, updates load balancers gracefully.
trigger_examples: prevents embarrassing "your connection is not private" outages

skills.label: Secrets In Code Remediator
skills.method: Detects hardcoded API keys in git, revokes them at the provider, rewrites commit history to wipe them.
trigger_examples: automated disaster recovery for leaked keys

skills.label: Data Exfiltration Monitor
skills.method: Alerts security if an employee suddenly downloads 5GB of data from Salesforce to an unauthorized personal device.
trigger_examples: stops insider threats and ip theft

skills.label: Iam Least Privilege Enforcer
skills.method: Scans AWS IAM roles, identifies permissions unused in 90 days, auto-generates Terraform to revoke them.

skills.label: Phishing Incident Triage
skills.method: Analyzes employee-reported emails, extracts headers/URLs, detonates payload in a sandbox, blocks IP.
trigger_examples: replaces tier 1 security operations center (soc) analysts

skills.label: Vulnerability Sla Tracker
skills.method: Pings engineering managers via Slack if a critical CVE patch is approaching the mandated 14-day compliance limit.

skills.label: Ddos Traffic Analyzer
skills.method: Analyzes Nginx access logs during a spike, generates Cloudflare WAF rules to block the specific botnet fingerprint.
trigger_examples: keeps revenue-generating apps online during attacks

skills.label: Firewall Rule Cleaner
skills.method: Finds overlapping or obsolete IP block rules in Palo Alto networks and suggests safe removal.

skills.label: Penetration Test Report Parser
skills.method: Turns a 200-page PDF from a security firm into actionable, prioritized Jira tickets for developers.
trigger_examples: bridges the gap between auditors and engineers
